problem id: 29e458d6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  10110101 -> 10010000
  01110101 -> 00010000
  10001100 -> 01000110
  11000010 -> 01100001
  01001011 -> 00100001
  10100111 -> 10010001
  00011010 -> 00001001
  10010101 -> 11000000
  00111001 -> 10001100

query: 00100100
predicted answer: 00010010
